# nps_workshop_settings_chat (Resource)

The `nps_workshop_settings_chat` resource manages chat integration settings for Workshop. This is a singleton resource — one per tenant. The initial apply imports any existing values; subsequent applies push the configured values. Destroying the resource removes it from state without modifying the server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nps_workshop_settings_chat" "settings" {
  slack = {
    enabled             = true
    token               = "xoxb-replace-me"
    workspace           = "north-pole"
    use_emojis          = true
    hmac_signing_secret = "replace-me"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `slack` (Attributes) Slack bot integration settings. Setting this configures the Slack chat type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--slack))

<a id="nestedatt--slack"></a>
### Nested Schema for `slack`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the Slack bot is enabled.
- `hmac_signing_secret` (String, Sensitive) The HMAC signing secret for the Slack bot. Sensitive.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The Slack token for the bot to connect to the workspace. Sensitive.
- `url_redirect_cookie` (String) URL redirect cookie name.
- `use_emojis` (Boolean) Whether to use emojis in Slack messages.
- `workspace` (String) The Slack workspace to connect to.
